nasb.text: Only Jonathan the son of Asahel and Jahzeiah the son of Tikvah opposed this, with Meshullam and Shabbethai the Levite supporting them.

esv.text: Only Jonathan the son of Asahel and Jahzeiah the son of Tikvah opposed this, and Meshullam and Shabbethai the Levite supported them.

cnv.text: 只有亞撒黑的兒子約拿單和特瓦的兒子雅哈謝起來反對這提議，還有米書蘭和利未人沙比太支持他們。

ccb.text: 只有撒黑的儿子约拿单和特瓦的儿子雅哈谢反对这事，支持他们的还有米书兰和利未人沙比太。
